meanings.definition: run until the normal working temperature is reached
examples: We warmed up the car for a few minutes
She warmed up after we had lunch together
The soup warmed slowly on the stove

meanings.definition: cause to do preliminary exercises so as to stretch the muscles
examples: The coach warmed up the players before the game

meanings.definition: make one's body limber or suppler by stretching, as if to prepare for strenuous physical activity
